description: Use this API to return character machine quantities. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.2.0. ierr, cval = macchr(ibus, id, string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the machine quantity desired. (input).

string.description: Non-conventional source positive sequence table (12 characters).
Non-conventional source negative sequence table (12 characters).

error_codes.description: Bus type code is not 2 or 3; ‘CVAL’ returned.
Sequence data not in case; ‘CVAL’ unchanged.
No non-conventional source data for this machine; ‘CVAL’ unchanged.
